Hero.title: Wealth Building with Gold
Hero.subtitle: Secure your future with physical gold. Hedge against inflation, earn passive returns, build crisis-proof wealth.
Hero.badgeTooltip: 100% physically backed, tangible and secure gold, free from the counterparty risks of paper gold (e.g. ETFs).

inflation.title: Hedge Against Inflation
inflation.description: Gold has preserved its purchasing power against fiat currencies for millennia.

passive.title: Passive Return Goals
passive.description: Earn up to 4% monthly cashback on your purchased gold accumulation.

security.title: Physical Security
security.description: Stored 100% in physical form in fully insured vaults.

step1.title: Open an Account
step1.description: Register for free and get access to the premium purchasing platform.

step2.title: Purchase Gold
step2.description: Start buying fractional physical gold with regular monthly EUR/HUF savings.

step3.title: Enjoy Passive Profits
step3.description: Watch your wealth grow with an average 5-8% annual appreciation and the 10% loyalty bonus.

Calculator.title: Passive Profit Calculator
Calculator.goldGrowthTooltip: This figure is based on the historical Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of gold over the past decades. Please note that past performance is not a guarantee of future results; gold prices may fluctuate based on global market conditions.
Calculator.tierUgyfelDesc: Steady 2% monthly growth, capping at 72% of the invested capital after 36 months.
Calculator.tierVasarloiDesc: The same 2% curve, but with a spectacular 'jump' at month 36 (+36% bonus), reaching 108%. This is the 'reward' moment.
Calculator.tierPremiumDesc: The 4% monthly discount tallies here, reaching 144% by month 36, after which the 200% fee-refund phase begins.

TrustSignals.title: Reliability and Security Above All
TrustSignals.goodDelivery: LBMA Good Delivery certified gold bars
TrustSignals.goodDeliveryTooltip: The highest standard of quality, purity, and reliability set by the London Bullion Market Association, guaranteeing global acceptance.
TrustSignals.vaultsTooltip: Directly and ethically sourced gold from Ghana's most reliable mines, ensuring complete traceability of origin.
TrustSignals.auditTooltip: All transactions and inventory are regularly verified by independent international auditing firms to ensure 100% transparency.

LeadForm.title: Start Building Your Wealth
LeadForm.subtitle: Request a free consultation with our experts and learn how to create crisis-proof assets.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.introduction: This Privacy Policy describes how your personal information is collected, used, and shared when you visit or make a request on Aranyad.
Privacy.dataCollectionText: We collect your Name, Email Address, and Phone Number only when you explicitly provide it by filling out our contact forms.
Privacy.purposeText: The information collected is used strictly for contacting you regarding gold savings, providing consultations, and offering information about our passive profit programs.
Privacy.storageText: Your data is stored securely in our local encrypted database. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.
Privacy.rightsText: Under GDPR regulations, you have the right to request the deletion of your personal data at any time. To do so, please contact us directly.

Consent.checkboxText: I agree to the Privacy Policy and consent to being contacted regarding gold savings.
Consent.required: You must agree to the Privacy Policy to proceed.

Cookie.message: We use cookies to ensure you get the best experience on our website.
